Hero.description: DeverCrowd is your digital product partner. We design and develop high-performing websites, mobile applications, and custom systems that increase leads, automate operations, and improve customer experience.

About.title: About DeverCrowd
About.description_1: is a digital product studio focused on building business-ready solutions.
About.description_2: We partner with startups and companies to plan, design, and develop high-performing websites, mobile applications, and scalable platforms that support real growth.

vmc.vision_desc: We aim to be the trusted digital product partner for ambitious businesses, helping them compete, scale, and lead through better digital experiences.
vmc.mission_desc: We build websites, mobile apps, and custom digital solutions that solve real business problems and deliver measurable outcomes.
vmc.approach_desc: We work as a product-minded team: understand your goals, design with users in mind, and deliver reliable software with clear communication at every step.

Footer.description: Building digital products that grow your business.

OurStack.title: The Stack Behind the Work
OurStack.description: Every project is built on a foundation of modern, battle-tested technologies — chosen for performance, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

OurTeam.title: Who's Behind the Scenes?
OurTeam.description: Driven by passion and expertise, our team collaborates to turn ideas into impactful, high-quality digital experiences.

Testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
Testimonials.description: We don't just deliver code — we deliver results. Here's what the people we've worked with have to say about the experience.

Services.subtitle: What We Offer
Services.description: We provide a range of services to achieve your digital goals. Choose what fits you best.

items.title: Design
items.subtitle: UI/UX & Brand Identity
items.text: Turn ideas into interfaces that wow. We design sleek, modern visuals that grab attention, build trust, and keep users coming back.

items.title: Development
items.subtitle: Web & Mobile Engineering
items.text: We build blazing-fast, scalable websites and platforms that work flawlessly — helping you grow, sell, and succeed online.

items.title: Security
items.subtitle: Protection & Compliance
items.text: Sleep easy — your platform is protected. We secure your data, block threats, and ensure your users always feel safe.

items.title: Support
items.subtitle: Ongoing Partnership
items.text: We're your tech partner, not just your developers. Get quick fixes, updates, and ongoing guidance to keep your platform running perfectly.
